html:
2026-0603
2026-06-12FINCustoms TariffCICEPA Rules of Origin for Casual Goods RegulationsCICEPA Rules of Origin for Casual Goods Regulations in order to establish that non-commercial goods acquired in Indonesia, that are either marked as made in Indonesia or not marked to the contrary, are considered originating and therefore entitled to the relevant CICEPA tariff preferences upon their importation into Canada.Registration: SOR/2026-0125 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: CICEPA Rules of Origin for Casual Goods Regulations
precis: CICEPA Rules of Origin for Casual Goods Regulations in order to establish that non-commercial goods acquired in Indonesia, that are either marked as made in Indonesia or not marked to the contrary, are considered originating and therefore entitled to the relevant CICEPA tariff preferences upon their importation into Canada.
